title: centaurea nigra subsp. gueryi
intro: Centaurea nigra subsp. gueryi, also known as the Cornflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae) and is native to France. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea nigra subsp. gueryi include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
